channel.title: Vox English
channel.description: Vox English is temporarily active for podcast-platform account maintenance. This placeholder feed will be retired again after platform cleanup is complete.
channel.itunes:author: skepvox
channel.itunes:summary: Vox English is temporarily active for podcast-platform account maintenance. This placeholder feed will be retired again after platform cleanup is complete.

item.title: Temporary Platform Recovery Episode
item.description: This temporary placeholder episode exists only to refresh the Vox English feed for podcast-platform account maintenance before the show is retired again. It uses an existing skepvox audio asset from Vox Español so platforms can read a valid active feed item.
item.content:encoded:
This temporary placeholder episode exists only to refresh the Vox English feed for podcast-platform account maintenance before the show is retired again.

It uses an existing skepvox audio asset from Vox Español so platforms can read a valid active feed item.
